parameters.query: INSERT INTO pb_leads (email, phone, name, source) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4) ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE SET phone = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.phone, pb_leads.phone), name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.name, pb_leads.name), source = COALESCE(pb_leads.source, EXCLUDED.source), updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id;
INSERT INTO pb_conversations (lead_id, session_id, transcript, message) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4);
